Reviews Contact

Our Services

Professional masonry solutions for every need

Historic Brick Repointing

Breathable lime mortar repairs that preserve 100+ year old Philadelphia brickwork.

Learn More →

Chimney Rebuilding

Structurally sound rebuilds that withstand Philly's Nor'easters and ice dams.

Learn More →

Stone Foundation Repair

Stabilizing Philadelphia's iconic rubble stone foundations for another century.

Learn More →

Brick Paver Installation

Permeable paving solutions for Philly's tight rowhouse courtyards and walkways.

Learn More →

Concrete Block Construction

Fast, durable CMU walls for Philadelphia garages, additions, and retaining walls.

Learn More →

Fireplace Refacing

Transforming outdated hearths into Center City showpieces with real masonry.

Learn More →

Parging & Waterproofing

Stopping basement leaks in Philadelphia's century-old foundations.

Learn More →
Horizon Masonry

Trusted masonry professionals serving Philadelphia, PA and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.

555-mas-r90
